observed_anomaly_cues: Surface irregularity consistent with weaving fault
Visual pattern suggesting loose or misaligned thread
Localized deviation from normal carpet appearance
mechanism_explanation: Loom malfunction or thread tension error during the weaving process.
severity_visual_description: minor loose or misaligned thread visible under inspection lighting
corrective_action: Recalibrate loom and replace worn thread guides.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the loose or misaligned thread would be absent and surface appears normal.
